audit_meta.honest_assessment: LaunchedIn10 continues its slow, steady growth trajectory. GSC impressions up 22% (700 to 852), queries at position 1-10 nearly tripled (15 to 41). The /blog/ stale-crawl crisis is resolved. Bing /case-studies/ recovered. The FAQPage duplicate bug (ACT-LI10-023) is now open across 7 consecutive audits (49 days) with zero code fix deployed — this remains the ONLY genuine technical issue. Content pipeline stalled 66 days. The site needs content velocity and time, not intervention.

action_items.description: FAQPage duplicate schema error on /case-studies/ — now open across 7 consecutive audits (49 days) with zero code fix deployed. GSC Rich Results on /case-studies/ returns ERROR: 'Duplicate field FAQPage' (3 instances, confirmed 25.05.26). The cause is confirmed: Home.jsx injects FAQPage schema during SPA hydration, which conflicts with the SSG-injected FAQPage from generate-static.js. When /case-studies/ renders client-side, it picks up both schemas, producing duplicates. This blocks FAQ rich results on the highest-engagement commercial page (0.636 engagement rate, 11 sessions in 90d). The fix is architectural: remove FAQPage injection from Home.jsx entirely and rely on the SSG-only path via generate-static.js. This is the single most impactful code change available for this site.
action_items.prompt: Fix the FAQPage duplicate schema error on launchedin10.co.uk /case-studies/ page. Open the repo EldrisOU/launchedin10-final. In src/pages/Home.jsx (or wherever the homepage component defines homeSchema), find the FAQPage schema block and REMOVE it entirely. The SSG build (generate-static.js) already injects FAQPage correctly — the React component must NOT also inject it. After removal: 1) Run npm run build. 2) Check dist/case-studies/index.html — grep for 'FAQPage' and confirm only ONE instance exists. 3) Deploy to Cloudflare Pages. 4) After deploy, run gsc_inspect_url on https://launchedin10.co.uk/case-studies/ and confirm FAQ rich results pass without duplicate errors.
action_items.verification: Run gsc_inspect_url on https://launchedin10.co.uk/case-studies/ — Rich Results should show FAQ: PASS with zero 'Duplicate field' errors. Also run rich_results_test on the same URL.
action_items.evidence: GSC URL Inspection 25.05.26: /case-studies/ Rich Results = FAIL, 3x 'Duplicate field FAQPage' ERROR. Open since Run 10 (06.04.26). 7 consecutive audits, 49 days, zero code change.
action_items.estimated_impact: Unblocks FAQ rich results on the highest-engagement commercial page. Potential click-through uplift from FAQ snippets in SERPs.

action_items.description: Three Bing subpages remain in stale-empty-crawl state (IsPage=true, DocumentSize=0) after /case-studies/ recovered (DocSize=15,539, crawled 24.05.26). Remaining affected URLs: /seo-automation/ (last crawled 05.04.26, 50 days stale), /website-translation/ (crawled 08.05.26, 17 days stale), /blog/website-design/accessibility-checker-website-essential/ (crawled 01.05.26, 24 days stale). Additionally, /blog/website-design/web-content-accessibility-guidelines-11-key/ has never been discovered or crawled by Bing. These pages are in Bing's index but with empty cache bodies — meaning they cannot appear in Bing SERPs and are NOT available to ChatGPT or Copilot for citation retrieval. Practical impact is currently limited (Bing has zero impressions site-wide) but maintaining Bing cache health is necessary for when authority grows. The SPA architecture (React + client-side rendering) is the likely root cause — Bingbot may not execute the JS needed to render page content.
action_items.prompt:
Submit the 4 stale-empty-crawl URLs to Bing for re-crawling. Run this exact command:

curl -s -X POST 'https://ssl.bing.com/webmaster/api.svc/json/SubmitUrlBatch?apikey=30fa478ccc434486be022a3e6a513dca' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"siteUrl":"https://launchedin10.co.uk/","urlList":["https://launchedin10.co.uk/seo-automation/","https://launchedin10.co.uk/website-translation/","https://launchedin10.co.uk/blog/website-design/accessibility-checker-website-essential/","https://launchedin10.co.uk/blog/website-design/web-content-accessibility-guidelines-11-key/"]}'

Expected response: {"d":null} = success.

Then verify after 7 days by running GetUrlInfo on each URL — check if DocumentSize > 0. If still 0, investigate whether generate-static.js is producing full HTML for these pages (the SSG should provide static HTML that Bingbot can read without JS execution).
action_items.verification: Run Bing GetUrlInfo on each URL after 7 days. DocumentSize should be > 0 for at least some of the 4 URLs. Command: curl -s 'https://ssl.bing.com/webmaster/api.svc/json/GetUrlInfo?siteUrl=https%3A%2F%2Flaunchedin10.co.uk%2F&url={encoded_url}&apikey=30fa478ccc434486be022a3e6a513dca'
action_items.evidence: Bing Block A GetUrlInfo 25.05.26: /seo-automation/ Size=0 (crawled 05.04.26), /website-translation/ Size=0 (crawled 08.05.26), accessibility-checker Size=0 (crawled 01.05.26), wcag-guidelines discovered=never. /case-studies/ RECOVERED to Size=15539 (crawled 24.05.26).

resolved_items.description: /blog/ Google re-crawl — RESOLVED. Google re-crawled /blog/ on 22.05.26 after being 57 days stale (last crawl was 22.03.26). The re-crawl requests from prior audits eventually took effect. GSC URL Inspection confirms: Submitted and indexed, lastCrawlTime = 2026-05-22T18:01:26Z.
resolved_items.evidence: GSC URL Inspection 25.05.26: /blog/ lastCrawlTime = 2026-05-22T18:01:26Z. Was 2026-03-22 at prior audit.

resolved_items.description: IndexNow key deployment — RESOLVED. The key verification file at https://launchedin10.co.uk/40b3efc5ab8e4c0e9ca6163daca5d29e.txt returns HTTP 200 with correct content type (text/plain). The file exists in the repo at public/40b3efc5ab8e4c0e9ca6163daca5d29e.txt. Prior audit (Run 14) incorrectly stated it was not deployed — the file was present in the codebase and live on the domain.
resolved_items.evidence: curl -sI https://launchedin10.co.uk/40b3efc5ab8e4c0e9ca6163daca5d29e.txt returns HTTP 200 with Content-Type: text/plain.

resolved_items.description: /case-studies/ Bing stale-empty-crawl — RECOVERED. Bing re-crawled /case-studies/ on 24.05.26 with DocumentSize=15,539 bytes (was 0 at Run 14). The SubmitUrlBatch request from Run 14 was effective for this URL. Remaining 3 stale-empty pages tracked under ACT-LI10-027.
resolved_items.evidence: Bing GetUrlInfo 25.05.26: /case-studies/ DocumentSize=15539, LastCrawled=24.05.26. Prior: Size=0.

resolved_items.description: /website-translation/ Google indexing regression — resolved at Run 14.
Bing /blog/ stale-empty-crawl — resolved at Run 14. DocSize=55,968.
dateModified JSON-LD fix — resolved at Run 13.
